_comment: Template for ~/.hermes/skills/.bundled_manifest enumeration. Rendered at install time by tools/seed_bundled_skills.py. v1 is read-only on the desktop side; this file is the authoritative source for which skills shipped with the install. Each entry records `source` so the desktop catalog can label/group bundled vs hub-installed vs user-authored skills without writing to ~/.hermes/skills/* itself.
_legacy_text_file: Co-emitted as ~/.hermes/skills/.bundled_manifest (one `name:sha256` per line) for backward compat with tools/skill_usage.py:_read_bundled_manifest_names.
